params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: WSA v3 D20b v0 L1 canary verify (PC1) — previously NEEDS_LOGIN, user directive 2026-05-14: anonymous prompt possible, proceed. Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. tag=v2.2.3-v0-L1-canary-pc1

test_steps: 1. Open https://v0.dev/ (anonymous session — no login required per user directive)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) into the v0 chat input
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert (Korean '차단' text in DOM is primary signal)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied, add to PC1-verified list (strict 18/20 = 0.900)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_AUTH: login required / session expired — site requires login after all
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL_INFRASTRUCTURE: site unreachable or infrastructure-side failure (not APF failure)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: WSA v3 D20b v0 L1 canary verify (PC1) — anonymous flow per user directive 2026-05-14. Previously NEEDS_LOGIN; user confirms prompt accessible without login. Target: v0.dev, anonymous session, check Korean warning '차단'. tag=v2.2.3-v0-L1-canary-pc1
